name: Delegation and subagent runtime linkage
objective: Expose daemon-owned parent/child delegation state as a typed, recoverable, product-safe runtime contract.

scenarios.promptShape: Delegate repo verification task; child fails validation and parent receives typed feedback.
scenarios.proofMode: focused Rust unit proof with persisted parent/child state, worker assignment/result, trajectory, and brain records

scenarios.promptShape: Inspect a disposable runtime thread through the headless bridge.
scenarios.proofMode: real ioi-runtime-bridge start_thread plus inspect_thread replay

remainingLiveProof: Run a real Agent Studio delegated worker scenario, browser subagent scenario, and restart/recover scenario during integrated product soak.
